content: REACTNATIVE WITH EXPO
Install Node.js
Create new expo Project
Install Expo Go on mobile
Start the Expo Development server
Scan the QR code to run the app using Expo go installed on mobile.
To test on Android Studio or Using Physical device, download & install Android Studio with SDK, NDK and create a Virtual Device.
Set env var User Varables on PC:
1. new=> ANDROID_HOME:C:/Users/user-name/AppData/Local/Android/Sdk
2. Path=> Edit=> New then add C:\Users\user-name\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools
CMake will be downloaded by android studio, set the cmake path in environmental variables
To generate Development build / android folder
npx expo prebuild
To run the developemnt build / test apk on mobile Connect mobile to PC using USB and enable UsbDebugging in Developer Options. Then in terminal at any path, run:
adb devices
It will display the connected mobile phone model number as unauthenticated. In mobile it will prompt to allow the PC to debug, Accept/Ok the request.
To connect wirelessly, connect PC and mobile to same network and then run:
adb connect mobile_ip_address
To run using prebuild android folder on physical device / on android studio run:
npm run android
To reduce APK size add in app.json:

In expo obj: “useLegacyPackaging”:true,
In expo.android: “enableProguardInReleaseBuilds”: true
To generate a key for signing the apk, open new terminal as Admin and navigate to the path

cd C:\Program Files\Java\jdkx.x.x_x\bin
keytool -genkeypair -v -storetype PKCS12 -keystore file_name.keystore -alias file_name_alias -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000
Place the file_name.keystore file under the android/app directory in project folder.
Edit the file ~/.gradle/gradle.properties or android/gradle.properties, and add the following (replace ***** with the correct keystore password, alias and key password)

MYAPP_UPLOAD_STORE_FILE=file_name.keystore
MYAPP_UPLOAD_KEY_ALIAS=file_name_alias
MYAPP_UPLOAD_STORE_PASSWORD=*****
MYAPP_UPLOAD_KEY_PASSWORD=*****
To generate android folder / Development build
Clean up the build
Generate the final APK
for signingReport:
